response.overview: People are dying around Tom, an ex-police officer who is caught in the middle of a plot to take over a corrupt construction company where the foundation for business seems to be murder! However, there may be more to the psychosis of what's going on than meets the eye. Regional Chicago filmmakers Brian Stein and Scott Varney create a fun Giallo-inspired mystery that's a bloody good time!
response.title: A Drop of Blood
